title: Faces of emotional words
description: This interactive p5.js project explores the universal language of human emotion through generative portraiture. Users can select from seven basic emotions—joy, sadness, anger, fear, disgust, surprise, and contempt—each represented by a unique facial expression composed entirely of emotion-related words in multiple languages. The facial contours, including the head, eyes, eyebrows, and mouth, are dynamically drawn using spaced, legible text, allowing the viewer to "read" the emotion visually and linguistically. This piece blends code, typography and emotional expression.
